title: John Hodge
compiled_truth: John Hodge is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-01-12 to 2002-01-16), John Hodge sent 61 and received 636 emails, totalling 697 interactions. Top correspondents: [Chris Germany](people/chris-germany) (11), [Ruth Concannon](people/ruth-concannon) (6), [Gerald Nemec](people/gerald-nemec) (6), [Scott Neal](people/scott-neal) (5), [Sstonestreet](people/sstonestreet-nisource) (5).
